name: Golden path: CMMC-aligned drift detected early and posture corrected
description: Defense-industrial storyline: programmatic comparison of authored policy versus observed identity controls reveals a lapse in MFA evidence collection for scoped users—corrective actions reconcile IdP attestations before an assessor-review window closes. Narrative emphasizes audit-friendly traceability without CUI payloads.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: SecureWatch merges IdP attestations against an modeled CMMC L2-aligned access profile for DEMO-BOUNDARY-77; discrepancy engine flags MFA proof documents older than contractual refresh.
Compliance analyst assigns owners; POA&M template pre-filled with deterministic due dates anchored to customer's assessor rehearsal calendar.
IdP reconciliation job records fresh MFA attestations across all in-scope admins; SSO policy snapshot exported for assessor binder (synthetic).
Control mapping regenerated; executive attestation drafted showing drift resolved ahead of blackout period—no regulated data payloads in simulator.

payload.title: DEMO: CMMC-modeled access drift — stale MFA attestations (synthetic)

payload.gap_plain_language: MFA enforcement evidence stale vs policy-defined refresh horizon.

events_emitted.headline: Drift surfaced as prioritized GRC backlog item
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Issue links to SSP narrative paragraphs and reviewer contacts without embedding export-controlled wording.

events_emitted.headline: Evidence refresh satisfied program office
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Auditor-visible folder structure populated with deterministic synthetic hashes only.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Framework-aligned drift consumes compliance agent mapping and SSP-adjacent metadata.

expected_remediation.summary: Refresh MFA attestations across in-scope admins, reconcile IdP configuration snapshot to modeled CMMC mode, regenerate evidence index for assessor rehearsal.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Auto-build POA&M rows with RACI placeholders and blackout-date awareness.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Responsible official signs closure narrative before assessor-ready export.

expected_final_report.title: Program briefing — modeled CMMC drift remediated ahead of rehearsal window
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: We converted a brittle evidence posture into audit-ready MFA proof across modeled L2-scope administrators, tightened traceability against the system security narrative, and closed the corrective record with deterministic exports suitable for primes and MSSPs managing DIB subcontractors.

golden_path_demo.executive_timeline_summary: The platform moves compliance from point-in-time binders to living telemetry: drift is detected on a management-friendly clock, owners are named, evidence is refreshed, and closure is expressed in language primes use with their assessors—without operational drag on engineering teams.

expected_database_outputs.business_outcome: Single source of truth for drift severity, responsible org, and closure state.
Roll-up scoring shows improving posture after evidence refresh (demo arithmetic).
Immutable pointers to IdP exports and analyst notes for assessor workflows.
Chain-of-custody for human approvals attaching to deterministic policy decisions.

expected_dashboard_summary.headline: Assessor-ready continuity — drift trending down ahead of blackout week
kpis: Mean time to reconcile modeled CMMC evidence gaps vs plan-of-action clock
Percent of modeled L2 admin population with refreshed MFA attestations
Count of SSP paragraphs auto-linked to validated evidence stubs
Program risk heatmap: ACCESS family trending green post-refresh
Cross-program comparables vs peer contractors (benchmark stub)
expected_dashboard_summary.narrative: Executives consume a readiness dial: backlog is shrinking by owner, blackout risks are proactively retired, and the platform narrates backlog as business outcomes—not ticket counts.
